subject: URGENT: System unavailable for over 30 minutes, severely impacting warehouse dispatch
body:
Hello, this is Director Zhao from Wantong Logistics. Our warehouse management system has been reporting frequent errors since 10:00 AM today, and for the past 30+ minutes it has been completely unusable. Real-time scheduling for over 200 warehouses is fully interrupted, delivery vehicles cannot receive dispatch instructions, estimated direct economic losses exceed 500,000 CNY per hour.

We are a VIP customer of your company, and our contract clearly stipulates 1-hour response and 4-hour resolution SLA standards. Please immediately initiate the emergency response process. I need to receive a resolution plan and estimated recovery time within 1 hour.

If this cannot be resolved today, we will pursue breach of contract liability per our agreement.

Wantong Logistics, Director Zhao
Phone: 13900140001

subject: Tech Department Weekly Report — 2026 Week 12
body:
This week's tech department work summary:
1. Completed v3.2 canary release
2. Database primary-replica failover drill completed successfully
3. Next week plan: API gateway upgrade, report module optimization

All teams please update JIRA progress promptly.
